summary: SLA113 Iteration 20 - Game OS Composer Lobby System testing complete. All 17 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: 7 lobby cards render with background previews, tier badges (GRAND/MAJOR/MINOR), Build & Deploy buttons. New Lobby modal opens with all fields (name, slug, main_boss, partner_boss, background, fish, jackpot_tier, base_bet, theme_color). Edit modal populates with existing values. Build & Deploy on Shadow Pack works - creates project+build+deploy, shows 'Last Deploy → Live' banner with Open Live link. Compiled game.js contains GAME_CONFIG.lobby with main_boss/partner_boss matching lobby config. fish_engine has BOSSES_ALL array with 'wanted' filter logic. /fish/lobbies endpoint NOT shadowed - returns 200.

issues: React duplicate key warning 'osp-Shadow Pack-fish_shooting' - FIXED by changing key to p.id

critical_code_review_comments: 7 default lobbies seeded on startup via seed_default_lobbies() in server.py lifespan
Lobby CRUD endpoints: POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/sla113/lobbies with LBY-{uuid} IDs
Deploy endpoint POST /api/sla113/lobbies/{id}/deploy creates project → build → compile → deploy in one shot
Compiled game.js includes GAME_CONFIG.lobby object with main_boss, partner_boss, extra_bosses, theme_color, jackpot_tier, base_bet
fish_engine.py filters BOSSES using 'wanted' Set from lobby config - only shows main_boss + partner_boss + extra_bosses
background_url in GAME_CONFIG is set from lobby.background_sprite via sprite registry lookup
/fish/lobbies (fish multiplayer) NOT shadowed by /lobbies (game composer) - different URL paths
GameComposerPanel.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements

test_credentials.note: No auth required for /sla113 - SLA113 dashboard is accessible without login

seed_data_creation: 7 default lobbies seeded: Shadow Pack, Jaguar Warrior, Quetzalcoatl Fireborn, Ocelotl Voidmane, Wolf Sovereign, Jaguar Elite, Jaguar Champion
context_for_next_testing_agent: SLA113 Iteration 20 adds Game OS Composer Lobby System: 1) GET /api/sla113/lobbies returns 7 seeded lobbies with LBY-{uuid} IDs, 2) POST creates new lobby (required: name, slug, main_boss_sprite), 3) GET /{id} returns details, 4) PATCH /{id} updates fields, 5) DELETE /{id} removes lobby, 6) POST /{id}/deploy creates project+build+deploy and returns preview_url. Frontend: FOUNDRY partition > GAME COMPOSER tab shows lobby grid with background previews, tier badges, Build & Deploy buttons. New Lobby button opens editor modal with all fields. Edit button populates modal with existing values. Deploy shows 'Deploying...' then 'Last Deploy → Live' banner with Open Live link. Compiled game.js contains GAME_CONFIG.lobby with boss filter config. fish_engine filters BOSSES_ALL by lobby.main_boss + partner_boss.

backend_api.notes: Returns 7 seeded lobbies with all required fields
Fish multiplayer endpoint NOT shadowed, returns 200
Creates fish lobby with FISH-{uuid} ID

frontend_ui.notes: 7 lobby cards with background previews, tier badges, Build & Deploy buttons
All fields present: name, slug, main_boss, partner_boss, background, fish, jackpot_tier, base_bet, theme_color, description
Populates with existing values (tested Shadow Pack)
Button shows 'Deploying...', then 'Last Deploy → Live' banner appears with Open Live link

compiled_game_validation.notes: Contains main_boss, partner_boss, extra_bosses, theme_color, jackpot_tier, base_bet
fish_engine has 'wanted' Set filter from LOB.main_boss + LOB.partner_boss
Set from lobby.background_sprite via sprite registry

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are real. Lobbies stored in MongoDB sla113_lobbies collection. Deploy uses emergent-mock CDN.
